code: import React from'react';import'./Analytics.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Analytics=()=>{const categories=[{name:'Manga',value:45,color:'#ff6b6b'},{name:'Manhwa',value:30,color:'#4ecdc4'},{name:'Video',value:25,color:'#45b7d1'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"analytics",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Analytics"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"analytics-grid",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"analytics-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Popularity by category"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"category-stats",children:categories.map(category=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"category-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"category-info",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"category-name",children:category.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"category-value",children:[category.value,"%"]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"category-bar",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"bar-fill",style:{width:"".concat(category.value,"%"),backgroundColor:category.color}})})]},category.name))})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"analytics-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Top titles"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"top-content-list",children:[{title:'Berserk',views:'1.2M'},{title:'Solo Leveling',views:'980K'},{title:'One Piece',views:'850K'}].map((item,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"top-content-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"content-rank",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"rank-number ".concat(index<3?'top-three':''),children:index+1})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"content-info",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"content-title",children:item.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"content-views",children:[item.views," views"]})]})]},item.title))})]})]})]});};export default Analytics;
